summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new PRONOKIF features: League Chat, Add League button, and Clickable Member Profiles. All backend APIs (15/15 new tests passed) and frontend UI working correctly.

backend_league_chat: POST /api/leagues/{league_id}/messages - Send message to chat (200 OK)
GET /api/leagues/{league_id}/messages - Returns list of messages (200 OK)
backend_league_members: GET /api/leagues/{league_id}/members - Returns member list with id, username, level, xp, is_owner (200 OK)
backend_public_profile: GET /api/users/{user_id}/profile - Contains stats (total_predictions, correct_poles, correct_winners, races_participated)
GET /api/users/{user_id}/profile - Contains leagues in common with position and points
frontend_dashboard_mes_ligues: Chat button visible in 'Mes Ligues' section (data-testid='league-chat-btn')
Add League button (+) visible in 'Mes Ligues' section (data-testid='add-league-btn')
Add League button navigates to /league page
frontend_league_chat_page: Shows league name and member count in header
Members bar shows all league members with avatars
Members in bar are clickable - navigate to /profile/:userId
Messages display with username, avatar, content, timestamp
Own messages styled differently (cyan color, right-aligned)
frontend_member_profile_page: Shows username, level, XP, member since date
Shows STATISTIQUES section (Pronostics, Courses, Vainqueurs exacts, Poles exactes)
Shows LIGUES EN COMMUN section with position and points
Shows DERNIERS PRONOSTICS section with race name and predictions
frontend_leaderboard_page: Chat button visible in Leaderboard header (data-testid='chat-btn')
Add League button (+) visible in Leaderboard header (data-testid='add-league-btn')

features_verified.league_chat_api_send: Working - POST /api/leagues/{league_id}/messages sends message with validation
features_verified.league_chat_api_get: Working - GET /api/leagues/{league_id}/messages returns messages in chronological order
features_verified.league_members_api: Working - GET /api/leagues/{league_id}/members returns member list with owner flag
features_verified.public_profile_api: Working - GET /api/users/{user_id}/profile returns stats, leagues, predictions
features_verified.clickable_leaderboard_members: Working - Both dashboard and leaderboard members navigate to /profile/:userId
features_verified.clickable_chat_members: Working - Members in chat bar navigate to /profile/:userId

seed_data_creation: Test chat messages created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features fully working: 1) League Chat at /league/:leagueId/chat with send/receive messages, member bar, 15s auto-refresh. 2) Add League button (+) in dashboard 'Mes Ligues' section and leaderboard header navigates to /league. 3) Member profiles at /profile/:userId accessible from leaderboard rows, dashboard leaderboard members, and chat member bar. Profile shows stats (predictions, poles, winners), leagues in common with positions, and recent predictions. Messages limited to 500 chars max. Test user TestPilote has 2 predictions (Japan & China 2026).

new_endpoints: POST /api/leagues/{league_id}/messages - Send message to league chat
GET /api/users/{user_id}/profile - Get public profile with stats
